task: I need to send a short update to a client about a revision delay. Can you help me draft a plain, professional note that explains the situation and gives a realistic next step? I also may need a second version for if they ask again later.

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here are two plain, professional versions you can use.

**Version 1: initial update**
> Hi [Client Name],  
> I wanted to let you know that the revision is taking a bit longer than planned. I’m still working through it and want to make sure it’s in good shape before sending it over. I expect to have the updated version to you by [day/time].  
> Thanks for your patience.

**Version 2: if they ask again later**
> Hi [Client Name],  
> Just a quick update: the revision is still in progress, and I’m finishing up the remaining changes now. I want to avoid sending anything incomplete, so I’m aiming to have it ready by [day/time].  
> I appreciate your patience and will keep you posted if anything changes.

If you want, I can also make these sound a little more **warm**, **more formal**, or **more firm**.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Clean and usable. I can swap in the actual day/time and send it.
